metaTitle: Hoeschathome | Cape Cod family home in Hyannis
metaDescription: A personal Cape Cod family home in Hyannis, directly on the water, with pool, jacuzzi, terrace, kayaks, SUPs, and relaxed time with family and friends.
sectionGalleryBody: Coffee at sunrise, afternoons by the pool, dinner on the terrace, and quiet hours after a long day outside.
sectionGalleryCaptionOne: A bright living area and kitchen made for easy meals and relaxed evenings.
sectionGalleryCaptionTwo: Waterfront views from the deck, with space for reading and slow mornings.
sectionGalleryCaptionThree: Pool time, sea air, and a shaded terrace for warm Cape Cod days.
galleryImageAltPrefix: Cape Cod beach house vacation rental photo
sectionAmenitiesHeading: Arrive, breathe out, and look over the water
sectionAmenitiesBody: Welcome to our home in Hyannis. Our Cape Cod family home sits directly on the water and is made for quiet days by the pool, shared evenings on the terrace, and small adventures by kayak or SUP. Perfect for everyone looking for sea air, open views, and relaxed time with family or friends.
sectionAmenitiesHighlight: Beach days, outdoor meals, and a calm place to come home to.
sectionAmenitiesPianoAlt: Waterfront terrace with dining table, green umbrellas, and bay views
sectionOutdoorHeading: Sea air from morning to night
sectionOutdoorBody: Start with sunrise over the water, spend the day between the beach and pool, then grill dinner on the deck as the sky softens. The house is made for easy days: walks by the water, reading outside, and unhurried time together.
sectionOutdoorHighlights: Walks by the water and through the dunes
Sunset and sunrise from the house
sectionEnvironmentHeading: A peaceful base on Cape Cod
sectionEnvironmentBody: Located directly on the water in Hyannis and close to the harbor, the house brings together two sides of Cape Cod: it is an ideal starting point for trips to Nantucket, Martha's Vineyard, beaches, dunes, and coastal towns, and at the same time a place where it feels wonderful to stay. With wide water views, pool, sunshine, kayaks, and SUPs, vacation starts right outside the door.
sectionEnvironmentHighlights: The sea right outside the door
Beaches, dunes, and coastal routes within easy reach
Sunrise and sunset from the house
sectionOptionalBody: The house is especially well suited for families and groups of friends traveling together while still wanting enough room to retreat. We will confirm the exact room setup, sleeping arrangements, and house details transparently with you before booking.
sectionOptionalHighlights: 3 bedrooms: 2 rooms with double beds, 1 room with bunk beds for up to 6 people
Small office in the tower with fast Wi-Fi and water views
sectionPhilosophyHeading: A family home on the water: personal, cared for, and easygoing
sectionPhilosophyBody: This is not an anonymous hotel stay, but our Cape Cod family home: bright, comfortable, and cared for with a lot of love. A place for relaxed days by the water, shared meals on the terrace, and uncomplicated time with family or friends.
sectionPhilosophyHighlights: Bright, breezy rooms with a relaxed coastal feel
Outdoor spaces for breakfast, grill evenings, and sunsets
Cozy evenings after a day at the beach or on the water
Personal notes for arrival, the house, favorite places, and day trips
sectionRetreatBody: A flexible beach-house setup for families and groups of friends.
sectionRetreatHighlights: Open kitchen and dining area with water views
Family-friendly, but not suitable for dogs
heroBody: Our family home in Hyannis, currently for family and friends of Hoeschathome.
heroAlt: Family-friendly Cape Cod waterfront home with pool terrace and water views
heroSubheadline: Currently for family and friends of Hoeschathome
footerTagline: A personal Cape Cod home for sea air, time by the water, and shared days with family and friends.
